description: Killed calculator.exe [pid: 40396] with image path: c:\program files\windowsapps\microsoft.windowscalculator_10.2002.13.0_x64__8wekyb3d8bbwe\calculator.exe

outputs.description: Infocyte alertId Infocyte.Alert.scanId Infocyte scanId the alert originated from
outputs.name: Infocyte.Alert.id

outputs.description: Name of alerted file or alert Infocyte.Alert.type Type of object or artifact (process, module, artifact, autostart, script, etc.)
outputs.name: Infocyte.Alert.name

outputs.description: Threat category assigned by extension logic (Good, Low risk, Unknown, Suspicious, Bad) Infocyte.Alert.hasAvScan True if it has been scanned by AV and/or sandbox malware engines
outputs.name: Infocyte.Alert.threatName

outputs.description: 0-10 confidence score. Higher = more confident. Infocyte.Alert.avPositive Number of engines and threat intel sources flagging the object as bad
outputs.name: Infocyte.Alert.threatScore

outputs.description: Number of engines and threat intel sources that analyzed the object Infocyte.Alert.synapseScore Infocyte proprietary machine learning score on maliciousness. Negative (especially below -1) indicates backdoor or remote access tool features (generally bad), positive is good
outputs.name: Infocyte.Alert.avTotal

outputs.description: Size of object/file in bytes Infocyte.Alert.flagname Name of user assigned flag in Infocyte on this artifact
outputs.name: Infocyte.Alert.size

outputs.description: 0-10 user-assigned score assigned to the flag. Higher = more critical Infocyte.Alert.createdOn date
outputs.name: Infocyte.Alert.flagWeight

outputs.description: Infocyte.Alert.hostname Hostname of target host Infocyte.Alert.sha1
outputs.name: Datetime stamp the alert

outputs.description: Sha1 (fileRepId) of file Infocyte.Alert.signed Valid and unexpired digital signature on file
outputs.name: string

outputs.description: File has been hash validated as part of a linux package manager
outputs.name: Infocyte.Alert.managed
